# Tomáš Souček

> Fullstack developer building reliable, polished web applications from frontend to backend.

## About

Tomáš Souček is a fullstack developer based in Denmark. He specialises in building modern web
applications with a strong focus on code quality, clean architecture, and good user experience.

## Skills

- **Frontend**: React, Vue / Nuxt, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Angular, HTML / CSS, Figma
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, Flask, PHP, Laravel, C#, C / C++, REST API
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Cloud Computing (AWS), Kubernetes, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Linux, Grafana, Prometheus
- **Data & Testing**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Apache Spark, Playwright, Vitest
- **Architecture & Quality**: Software Architecture, Clean Code, Microservices, Event Driven Architecture, UML

## Links

- Website: https://soucek.dk
- GitHub: https://github.com/sukensie
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/soucek-tomas
